title: butea ferruginea
intro: Butea ferruginea, also known as the Ironwood or Red Ironwood, is a tree species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Butea ferruginea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Butea ferruginea are available in the form of capsules, tablets, and decoctions, and are often used to make Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
